intent: Add a p95 latency guarantee (<= 300ms) to the CreateBooking workflow.

asserts: The guarantee is declared in the canonical IR produced from the evolved spec.
Arch deterministically regenerates the CreateBooking workflow under ownership boundaries and emits a guarantee test scaffold traceable to the IR.
arch check reports no hash / missing-file / static-guarantee drift for the regenerated artifacts.
verifierBacked.verifiedBy: arch parse --emit-ir -> canonical arch.ir.v1 -> generate -> arch check

doesNotVerify: Real p95 latency under representative production load.
Behavioral verification of the latency bound requires a load/benchmark oracle, deferred to Phase 2+ (roadmap: "Latency guarantees").
